en: Paul, a prisoner for Christ Jesus, and Timothy our brother, To Philemon our beloved fellow worker
zh: 為基督耶穌被囚禁的保羅，和提摩太弟兄，寫信給我們所愛的，又一同作工的腓利門，

en: and Apphia our sister and Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church in your house:
zh: 和亞腓亞姊妹，並我們的戰友亞基布，以及在你家裡的教會。

en: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 願恩惠平安從我們的父 神和主耶穌基督臨到你們。

en: I thank my God always when I remember you in my prayers,
zh: 我聽見你對主耶穌和眾聖徒有愛心和信心，我每逢禱告提到你的時候，就常常感謝我的 神。

en: because I hear of your love and of the faith that you have toward the Lord Jesus and all the saints,
and I pray that the sharing of your faith may become effective for the full knowledge of every good thing that is in us for the sake of Christ.
zh: 願你與眾人分享你的信心的時候，會產生功效，使我們可以知道在我們中間的一切善事，都是為基督作的。

en: For I have derived much joy and comfort from your love, my brother, because the hearts of the saints have been refreshed through you.
zh: 弟兄啊，眾聖徒的心既然從你得到舒暢，我也因你的愛心，得到更大的喜樂和安慰。

en: Accordingly, though I am bold enough in Christ to command you to do what is required,
zh: 我在基督裡雖然可以放膽吩咐你作應作的事，

en: yet for love's sake I prefer to appeal to you- I, Paul, an old man and now a prisoner also for Christ Jesus-
zh: 然而像我這上了年紀的保羅，現在又是為基督耶穌被囚禁的，寧願憑著愛心請求你，

en: I appeal to you for my child, Onesimus, whose father I became in my imprisonment.
zh: 就是為我在囚禁時所生的兒子歐尼西慕求你；

en: (Formerly he was useless to you, but now he is indeed useful to you and to me.)
zh: 他從前對你沒有甚麼好處，但現在對你我都有好處。

en: I am sending him back to you, sending my very heart.
zh: 我現在打發他親自回到你那裡去；他是我所心愛的。

en: I would have been glad to keep him with me, in order that he might serve me on your behalf during my imprisonment for the gospel,
zh: 我本來想把他留在我這裡，使他在我為福音被囚禁時，可以替你服事我。

en: but I preferred to do nothing without your consent in order that your goodness might not be by compulsion but of your own free will.
zh: 但還沒有得到你的同意，我就不願意這樣作，好叫你的善行不是出於勉強，而是出於甘心。

en: For this perhaps is why he was parted from you for a while, that you might have him back forever,
zh: 也許他暫時離開你，正是為了使你永遠得著他，

en: no longer as a slave but more than a slave, as a beloved brother- especially to me, but how much more to you, both in the flesh and in the Lord.
zh: 不再是奴隸，而是高過奴隸，是親愛的弟兄。對我固然是這樣，對你來說，不論按肉身或在主內的關係，更是這樣。

en: So if you consider me your partner, receive him as you would receive me.
zh: 所以，你要是把我看作同伴，就接納他好像接納我一樣。

en: If he has wronged you at all, or owes you anything, charge that to my account.
zh: 如果他使你受了損失，或欠你甚麼，都記在我的帳上。

en: I, Paul, write this with my own hand: I will repay it- to say nothing of your owing me even your own self.
zh: “我必償還”，這是我保羅親手寫的。用不著我說，甚至你的生命，你也是欠我的。

en: Yes, brother, I want some benefit from you in the Lord. Refresh my heart in Christ.
zh: 所以弟兄啊！讓我在主裡得到你的幫助，使我的心在基督裡得著暢快。

en: Confident of your obedience, I write to you, knowing that you will do even more than I say.
zh: 我深信你會聽從，也知道你所作的必超過我所說的，因此才寫信給你。

en: At the same time, prepare a guest room for me, for I am hoping that through your prayers I will be graciously given to you.
zh: 同時，還請你為我預備住的地方，因為我盼望藉著你們的禱告，可以獲得釋放到你們那裡去。

en: Epaphras, my fellow prisoner in Christ Jesus, sends greetings to you,
zh: 為基督耶穌的緣故和我一同坐監的以巴弗，

en: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, my fellow workers.
zh: 以及我的同工馬可、亞里達古、底馬、路加都問候你。

en: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit.
zh: 願主耶穌基督的恩惠常與你們同在。
